zh.lifeSummary: 當William Findern of Childrey於1395年出生在英國英格蘭德比夏爾分德時，他的父親Hugh Finderne11392歲，母親Aline Willington Heiress43歲。他於1404年5月之前與Alice Cokayne結婚。他去世於1445年3月13日在英國英格蘭奧可福爾瓦爾 本 懷特 霍爾享年50歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭波克夏也維勒聖 瑪麗 馮 維金。

nameMeanings.name: Findern
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: German: from Middle High German vinder ‘inventor’, possibly a nickname for a teller of tall stories or a person of great ingenuity.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When William Findern of Childrey was born in 1395, in Findern, Derbyshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Hugh Finderne, was 11392 and his mother, Aline Willington Heiress, was 43. He married Alice Cokayne before May 1404. He died on 13 March 1445, in Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, England, United Kingdom.

ko.All Saints' Church, Findern, South Derby: 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 핑더 앨 세인츠' c후르치
ko.St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire: 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 치벨리 스트 메리 테 버긴
ko.Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Englan: 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스
ko.lifeSummary: William Findern of Childrey(이)가 1395년 영국 잉글랜드 더비실르 핑더에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Hugh Finderne(은)는 11392세였고, 그의 어머니 Aline Willington Heiress(은)는 43세였다. 그는 1404년 5월 이전 Alice Cokayne(와)과 결혼했다. 그는 1445년 3월 13일 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 발 프 휘트 호르스에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 버크실르 치벨리 스트 메리 테 버긴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Findern of Childrey nasceu em 1395, em Findern, Derbyshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Hugh Finderne, tinha 11392 anos e sua mãe, Aline Willington Heiress, tinha 43 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Cokayne antes maio de 1404. Ele faleceu em 13 de março de 1445, em Vale of White Horse, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em St Mary the Virgin, Chieveley, Berkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Findern of Childrey родился в 1395 г. в местности финдирн, дирбишир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Hugh Finderne было 11392 года, а матери, которую звали Aline Willington Heiress, 43. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Cokayne перед май 1404 г. Он умер 13 марта 1445 г. в местности веил оф уит хаурс, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности ст мэри т виргин, чиивели, биркшир, Англия, Великобритания.
